hook.text: Two random humans share 99.9% of their DNA. The 0.1% difference doesn't map onto racial categories.

buildup.text: Human genetic diversity is greatest within Africa because that's where our species has existed the longest.

discovery.text: More genetic variation exists within any one continent than between continents. Race has no genetic basis.

twist.text: Traits like skin color vary gradually across geography, not in sharp boundaries. There are no pure races.

climax.text: Genetics confirms what anthropology long argued: human races are social inventions, not biological realities.

punchline.text: Our differences are real; racial categories are not.

quiz.question: Where is human genetic diversity greatest?
options: Within Africa, where humans have existed longest
